name: glidelite
author: Sander Veldhuis
description: Builds secure web applications including API, database, and worker support

scripts.build: npm run build:version && npm run build:compiler
scripts.build:version: node -p "'// Generated code, do not modify\nexport const version = ' + JSON.stringify(require('./package.json').version) + ';'" > src/version.ts
scripts.dist: npm run clean && npm run format && npm run lint && npm run build && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('lib', { recursive: true, force: true })" && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('lib')" && cpx "built/**/*.js" lib
